notes: The engineering layer preserves the verse's structural argument: the four denials follow because the Self lacks the structural property each medium requires (Shankara) or because the Self pervades the elements rather than being pervadable (Ramanuja). The engineering analog frames a well-specified contract as having the same structural exemption: the contract has no surface for the medium to engage. Crucially, the engineering layer does NOT distort the verse into a blanket 'all APIs are durable' claim — both falsifiability and counter-example explicitly carve out the case where 'protocols' that leak implementation accidents share the substrate's combustibility. The reverse-translate test (analog → verse) yields a stance compatible with the imperishable doctrine. PASS.
